---
id: BUG-011
title: compound commands: primary state change vs secondary side-effects - close failed loudly after succeeding; idempotent re-runs
depends_on: []
write_set: ["src/tasks/**","src/cli/commands/task*","src/db/backup*"]
requirements: []
evidence_required: ["red-test-output","verify-root","final-sha"]
---

## Task
Found 2026-07-11 while closing STORE-MIGRATION-MAIN-001: `task close` performed the review->done transition, THEN the done-event auto-backup refused ("2 live leases" - leases of UNRELATED packets) and the command exited with an error - the caller sees failure, the state says done, and a retry says "illegal transition done -> done". Two defects, one contract:
1. BUG: the done-event backup must tolerate live leases of OTHER packets (pass allowFreshLeases or scope the check to the closing packet); a side-effect refusing must never look like the state change failed.
2. CONTRACT (the class): every compound CLI command separates its PRIMARY state change from SECONDARY side-effects (backup, export regen, events are already transactional). Output reports each step with its own outcome; the exit code reflects the PRIMARY change only; secondary failures are LOUD warnings with the retry command printed. Idempotency: re-running a completed command reports "already done" (exit 0), never an illegal-transition error - audit close/move/start/import for this and fix violators.
3. Tests: close with unrelated live leases succeeds with a backup warning; re-close reports already-closed exit 0; the primary/secondary split asserted for each compound command.

## RED test (write first)
In a task-close test add a test named exactly: "close succeeds despite an unrelated live lease and re-close is an idempotent no-op". Fixture: packet A active/leased by another session, packet B in review with a merged-PR stub; close B -> assert done + exit 0 + backup warning present; close B again -> assert "already" message and exit 0. Today the backup refusal fails the command and re-close errors -> it FAILS.
Expected failure cause (literal string in the output): the test name "close succeeds despite an unrelated live lease and re-close is an idempotent no-op".

## Reuse
createStateBackup's allowFreshLeases option; the transition machinery; existing close tests.

## Stop conditions
Making backups silent (the warning must name the retry command); weakening the lease gate for the packet BEING closed; a second close path; touching files outside the write_set.

## Evidence required at close
red-test-output, verify-root, final-sha.
